source_title: 04 Tunnel - Raya and the Last Dragon/16 Torches - SubUV Animation

evidences.content: 因此，当我们为虚幻创建特效元素时，就像这里的火炬一样、 So when we're creating effects elements for Unreal, like this torch that we have here, 我们真的需要重新思考如何完全处理这些元素。 we really need to rethink how we're going to approach elements entirely. 因为我们正试图将在编译器中完成的工作，引入到实时引擎中。 Because we're trying to take something that we would do in comp and bring it into a real-time engine. 我们希望以最适合实时引擎的方式创建它、 And we want to create it in a way that works best for the real-time engine, 而不是我们以前工作流程的最佳方式。 not what works best for our previous workflows. 因此，这其实相当简单明了。 So it's actually fairly straightforward. 我们要做的就是截取一段视频，就像这里的火炬元素、 And what we're going to do is we're going to take a video clip, like this torch element that we have here, 我们要将其转换成一种叫做子 UV 精灵表的东西。 and we're going to convert it into something that's called a sub UV sprite sheet. 它可以将视频片段转换成单一纹理 This can take a video clip and turn it into a single texture 可以在虚幻引擎中无限回放和循环。 that can be played back and looped infinitely inside of Unreal Engine. 因此，视频剪辑和视频文件并不能很好地融入游戏引擎、 So instead of having a video clip and a video file, which doesn't feed into a game engine all that well, 然后像这样把它转换成纹理、 and we're going to convert it into a texture like this, 这里的每张图片都是我们正在回放的不同帧。 where every single image here is a different frame that we're playing back. 现在，我们可以将其作为纹理导入，然后将此材质分配给一个平面、 Now we can import this as a texture and just assign this material to a plane, 它就会以火炬动画的形式播放。 and it will play back in this torch animation. 因此，这有两个步骤。 So there's two steps to this. 首先是将我们的视频片段转换成像这样的精灵表、 The first is converting our video clip into a sprite sheet like this, 然后我们将在虚幻中创建材质着色器。 and then we'll create our material shader inside of Unreal. 那么，我们该如何创建这个火炬元素呢？ So how do we create this torch element? 好吧，这个原始元素可以是素材，可以是烟羽，可以是任何东西。 Well, this original element could be stock footage, it could be a smoke plume, it could be anything. 在这个例子中，我只用了一个手电筒。 I'm just using a torch for this example. 这是从 EmberGen 中模拟出来的。 This is a simulation out of EmberGen. 速度有点慢，所以我重新调试了一下，速度快了一倍、 It was a little bit slow, so I'm just retiming it to be twice as fast, 这样，当我回放时，看起来就正确了。 so that when I play it back, it looks correct. 但棘手的是，我们的最终图像是 8x8 网格、 But the tricky thing here is our final image is in an 8x8 grid, 这意味着我们有 64 帧来制作循环动画。 which means we have 64 frames to play with to create our looping animation. 因此，如果是 8x8 网格，我们就有 64 个帧、 So if it's an 8x8 grid, we have 64 frames, 这相当于在虚幻中制作了 2.6 秒的循环动画。 which equals out 2.6 seconds of looping animation inside of Unreal. 但我们必须准备好这个元素，使其能正确循环。 But we'd have to prepare this element so that it loops correctly. 因此，如果我只抓取 64 帧，那么如果我从第 100 帧开始，并将结束帧设置为 163，也就是 64 帧、 So if I just grab 64 frames, so if I start at frame 100 and have our end frame set to 163, which is 64 frames, 我们会看到，在这条时间线的末尾，它确实又回到了起点。 we'll see at the end of this timeline, it does snap back to the beginning. 我们需要做一些准备工作来解决这个问题。 And we need to do a little bit of prep work to fix this. 现在，我将向您展示如何在 Nuke 中完成此操作，但同样的方法也适用于 After Effects。 Now, I'm going to show you how to do this in Nuke, but the same exact method applies in After Effects. 如果您有 After Effects，我将提供一个脚本链接，您可以运行该脚本 And if you have After Effects, I'll include a link for a script that you can run 还可以在本视频底部创建联系表。 to create a contact sheet as well at the bottom of this video. 因此，我已经找到了一个框架范围，虽然并不完美，但基本可以使用。 So I've gone ahead and found a frame range that mostly works, even though it's not perfect. 因此，我将其设置为 134 至 199，也就是 64 帧。 So I've set that to 134 to 199, which is 64 frames. 现在，我将在这两个节点中解决循环问题。 Now, how I'm fixing this looping problem is in these two nodes here. 因此，我所要做的就是将片段的时间偏移 64 帧，并在这里淡入结尾。 So all I'm doing is time offsetting our clip by 64 frames, and I'm fading in the ending here. 这就是合并复制节点的情况。 So that's what is happening with this merge copy node. 如果你看到这里的混合，我只是在慢慢混合我们框架范围的起始部分。 If you see this mix here, I'm just slowly mixing in the beginning of our frame range. 现在，通过在最后 10 个帧中淡入，你可以看到我们现在有了一个完美的循环 And now by fading this in over the last 10 frames, you can see we now have a perfect loop 在接缝不太明显的地方。现在，这对于像火这样的东西来说要容易得多、 where that seam isn't too obvious. Now, this is a lot easier for things like fire, 但这需要更多的准备工作、 which are very organic and random, but this does require a lot more prep work, 这取决于你要制作的元素类型。但你也可以用同样的方法来制作元素 depending on the type of element you're doing. But you could use the same methodology to make elements 如篝火、魔法效果、火花甚至爆炸。 like campfires, magic effects, sparks, or even explosions. 现在，我还加入了一点指数辉光来帮助我们。 Now, I've included a little bit of exponential glow as well to help us out. 还有一点也很重要，尤其是对于火来说，不要剪掉我们的纹理。 And it's also important, especially for fire, to not clip our texture. 我们要确保场景中最亮的值永远不会超过 1 We want to make sure that the brightest value in our scene never goes above 1 因为我们不想剪切任何信息。我们总是可以在虚幻中获得这些信息。 because we don't want to clip any information. We can always gain this up inside of Unreal. 但是，如果我们剪辑了其中的任何信息并将其丢失，那么在虚幻世界中我们将无法恢复任何信息。 But if we clip any of that information and lose it, there's nothing for us to recover inside of Unreal. 最重要的是，最后一步是创建一个联系表节点。 And then most importantly, the last step here is to create a contact sheet node. 因此，这将把我们的框架范围转换成这个子 UV 翻页书。 So this is what will convert our frame range into this sub UV flip book. 它通过输入 135 到 199 之间的帧范围来实现这一点。 And it does this by inputting a frame range between 135 to 199. 重要的是，你需要将行的顺序设置为从上到下，列的顺序设置为从左到右。 And importantly, you'll need to set the row order to top bottom and the column order to left right. 这样，每一行结束时，就会从正确的帧开始。 And that way at the end of each row, it'll start at the correct frame. 现在，我正在使用 Nuke Indie 来准备这张有渲染限制的联系表、 Now, I'm using Nuke Indie to prepare this contact sheet, which has a render restriction, 会导致无法渲染 4K 平方纹理。 which can prevent you from rendering a 4K square texture. 高度会限制在 3000 像素左右。 It'll limit it by about 3000 pixels in the height. 不过，无论你使用的是 Nuke 独立版还是 Nuke 非商业版，都有一个快速解决方法、 But a quick way around this, whether you're in Nuke Indie or Nuke Non-Commercial, 您可以将其裁剪为 4096 x 2048，然后缩小裁剪尺寸 is you can just crop this to 4096 by 2048 and reduce the crop size 并将这些接触片分成两片或四片 and split out these contact sheets into two or four slices 然后在 Photoshop 中重新组合整个正方形纹理。 and then reassemble the entire square texture inside of Photoshop. 这有点超出本课程的范围，但您也可以实现运动矢量。 This is a little bit beyond the scope of this course, but you can also implement motion vectors. 我将附上克莱门特-拉扎尔这篇博文的链接。 I'll include a link to this blog post by Clement Lazar. 但是，如果我们在 8x8 的精灵表中加入一个速度传递，就可以实现这种效果、 But by including a velocity pass along with our 8x8 sprite sheet, 我们可以在帧数之间进行插值，从而创建慢动作 we can interpolate in between our frame numbers so we can create slow motion 并将其缩减为 8x8 网格的纹理。 and reduce them down to an 8x8 grid of textures. 所以，如果你想更进一步，就去看看吧。 So check that out if you want to go one step further. 但现在，我有了我们完成的联系表、 But now that I have our finished contact sheet, 让我们看看如何将其带入虚幻并设置火炬着色器。 let's take a look at how to bring this into Unreal and set up our torch shader. 我们又回到了隧道环境中。 We're back in our tunnel environment. 让我们为火把制作材料。 Let's create our materials for our torches. 因此，我要在资产文件夹中创建一个新文件夹，并将其命名为火炬 So I'm going to create a new folder in our assets folder and call this torch 然后创建一个名为 MM torch underscore sub UV 的新材质。 and let's create a new material called MM torch underscore sub UV. 然后打开它，将纹理拖入我们的项目中 And we'll open this up and I'll drag this texture into our project 我将在下面附上视频和联系表 and I'll include both the video and this contact sheet below 因此，您可以点击视频下方的链接下载。 so you can download those by clicking the link below this video. 因此，让我把它拖到材料图中，然后做几件事。 So let me drag this into our material graph and let's do a couple things. 因此，要以正确的方式来设置我们的材料、 So to set up our material the right way, 我总是喜欢先设置这些材质设置。 I always like to set up these material settings first. 在这种情况下，我们确实有一个表面，因为我们要将纹理应用到一个平面上、 So in this case, we do have a surface because we're going to apply this texture to a plane, 但我们可以将混合模式设置为相加模式，因为火是相加的 but our blending mode we can set to additive because fire is additive 我们将在场景中添加发射光 and we're adding emissive light into our scene 这样就可以去掉一些我们不需要的东西，比如粗糙度、镜面反射或金属效果。 and this will get rid of things that we don't need like the roughness or specular or metallic 并可将阴影模型设置为无光照模式 and you can set the shading model to unlit mode 这样，我们就能准确获取纹理中的内容 so that we just get exactly what's in our texture 而且不受场景光线的影响。 and it's not affected by the lighting in the scene. 现在，让我们将其输入我们的发射颜色中 So now let's plug this into our emissive color 让我们马上在场景中预览一下。 and let's start to preview this in the scene right away. 因此，我要把这个拖到我们的焊枪上，设置旋转为负 90 度 So I'll drag this onto our torch set a rotation to negative 90 degrees 然后应用我们的材质并确保保存，以便我们的着色器可以编译。 and let's apply our material and make sure to save this so our shader compiles. 现在我们可以看到我们的接触页了。让我们将其旋转 90 度。 So now we can see our contact sheet. Let's rotate this 90 degrees. 现在我们来设置动画。 So it's oriented and now let's set up our animation. 因此，如果我在材质图上单击右键并输入子 UV、 So if I right-click in the material graph and type in sub UV, 我们有几种选择，只是让你知道这种微粒子紫外线是与尼亚加拉系统一起使用的。 we have a couple options just so you're aware this particle sub UV is for use with the Niagara systems. 因此，我们不希望任何东西低于微粒。 So we don't want anything under particles. 因此，我们有两个选择，分别是纹理采样参数子 UV 和子 UV 功能。 So the two selections that we have are the texture sample parameter sub UV and the sub UV function. 因此，让我们选择子 UV 功能 So let's select the sub UV function 这样我们就能得到一个 UV 贴图，并将其插入我们的纹理样本中。 and this will give us a UV map that we can plug into our texture sample. 现在，它要求我们输入四项材料功能。 Now it asks us for four inputs for material functions. 通常情况下，您需要为每个输入添加一个输入，否则会在编译时出错。 Typically, you'll need to add an input to each one of these or it will have a error in compilation. 情况并非总是如此，但你会发现默认材料功能通常就是这样设置的。 This isn't always the case, but you'll find this is often how the default material functions are set up. 因此，当你看到纹理 2D 时，实际上是在请求一个纹理对象。 So when you see texture 2D, it's really asking for a texture object. 因此，纹理对象和纹理样本之间的区别可能有点令人困惑。 So this can be a little bit confusing the difference between a texture object and a texture sample. 唯一不同的是，这个纹理对象只要求一个纹理。 The only difference here is this texture object is only asking for a texture. 因此，这是纹理样本的简化版，纹理样本也会要求 UV、 So this is the simpler version of a texture sample where texture samples will also ask for UVs, 但效果是一样的。因此，我们将浏览我们的火炬纹理、 but it works the same way. So we'll browse to our torch texture, 抓取我们的纹理对象，并使用我们从内容浏览器中选择的资产。 grab our texture object and use our selected asset from the content browser. 现在，如果有人要求你输入 UV，你就需要输入纹理坐标。 Now, if you ever get asked for a UV input, you'll want to type in texture coordinates. 这些只是我们的默认 UV 坐标，你可以在前面谈到精灵表时看到。 These are just our default UV coordinates, which you saw earlier when we talked about sprite sheets. 接下来是子图像。 And next we have sub images. 这就是在询问我们纹理对象的网格大小。 So this is asking us what our grid size is for our texture object. 所以我们要创建一个双向量。你看，上面写着 V2 代表两个向量。 So we'll want to create a two vector. You see it says V2 stands for two vector. 让我们创建两个浮点。按下 S 键并向下点击，创建一个标量参数 So let's create two floats. So I'll press the S key and click down to create a scalar parameter 我们把这个网格称为 X 网格，然后复制这个网格，称为 Y 网格。 and we'll call this grid X and then I'll duplicate this and call it grid Y. 现在，如果我制作一个追加矢量节点，我们就能将这两个浮点数转换成两个矢量 Now, if I make an append vector node, we'll be able to convert these two floats into a two vector 我们将其插入，并将这两个值都设置为 "8"。 and we'll plug that in and let's set both of these to eight. 最后一个输入项是 "帧"，询问我们在哪个帧上？ Now the last input here is frame and this is asking what frame are we on? 因此，我们有两个选择。我们可以创建一个时间节点。 So we have two options here. We can create a time node. 因此，时间节点就像我们蓝图中的"√"、 So the time node is just like our tick in our blueprints, 但我们也可以输入一个标量参数，并给它一个整数来表示我们所处的帧。 but we could also input a scalar parameter and give it a whole number for what frame we're on. 但在这种情况下，让我们将其设置为时间，我们也可以对时间节点进行操作、 But in this case, let's set it to time and we could also do things to a time node, 就像我们可以把时间节点乘以 2，时间就会以两倍的速度回放一样 like we can multiply a time node by two and time will play back twice as fast 或者你也可以将其乘以一半，这样速度就会减半，但我们默认将其保持为 1。 or you can multiply it by half and it'll go half speed, but we'll just keep it to one by default. 在本例中，我们已经输入了 2D 纹理和所有其他设置、 Now in this case, because we've input our texture 2D and all of our other settings, 我们不需要这个纹理样本了，但现在我们可以看到，我们又可以玩火了、 we won't need this texture sample, but now we can see we get our fire playing back, 但速度真的很慢。让我们将其设置为 24 but it's really slow. Let's set this to 24 现在我们可以在视口中正确播放火炬了。 and now we get our torch playing back correctly in our viewport. 现在，我们可以把它变小，然后对准焊枪的尖端。 Now we can make this smaller and we can line it up to the tip of our torch. 但有一点我们一眼就能看出，它非常暗淡、 But one thing that we can tell right away is that it's pretty dim, 有一种透明感，而且不是很明亮。 has a sense of transparency and it's not very bright. 因此，让我们添加一个乘法节点，我总是喜欢添加两套不同的颜色控件。 So let's add in a multiply node and I always like to add two different sets of color controls. 一个严格意义上的亮度参数。因此，制作一个标量参数，并将其称为亮度 One that's strictly brightness. So make a scalar parameter and call it brightness 因为我知道我们希望它更亮一些，所以我就把它设为 5。 and I'll just go ahead and set this to five because I know we want this to be quite a bit brighter 因为它毕竟是火。按下 "保存 "键后，感觉就自然多了。 because it is fire after all. We'll press save and already that starts to feel a lot more natural. 然后，我还喜欢添加一个矢量参数，这样我们就可以随时对颜色进行着色。 And then I like to also add in a vector parameter so we can always tint the color. 按下 V 键，然后单击，我们将其称为 "火焰色调"。 So press down the V key and click and we'll call this fire tint. 我们将默认设置为 "1"，这样就不会更改颜色，除非我们决定以后需要更改。 We'll set this to one by default so that it doesn't change the color unless we decide we need to change it later. 现在我们有了亮度参数、火色参数和网格参数。 So now we have our brightness parameter, our fire tint parameter, our grid parameters. 让我们为时间节点创建一个参数。 Let's create a parameter for our time node. 因此，我们将其称为 "速度"，并将其设置为 24。 So we'll call this speed and set it to 24. 最后，如果我们右击这个纹理对象，就可以将其转换为参数。 And lastly, if we right click this texture object, we can convert this to a parameter. 因此，我们将其称为子 UV 纹理。 So we'll call this sub UV texture. 现在，如果我们有不同的防火材料，我们就可以在材料实例中快速更换。 And now if we had different fire materials, we could quickly swap this out in a material instance. 好的，很好那我们就来清理一下火堆的大小。 Okay, great. So let's just clean up the size of our fire. 我们可以把这个骗得更薄一点，让它离火尖更近一点。 We could cheat this to be a little bit thinner and let's just get it a little bit closer to the tip of our fire. 我们可能希望把它放在火炉前。 And we'll probably want it to be in front of our fire. 这样就把尖端遮住了。让我们看看通过相机镜头看到的效果。 So it obscures the tip there. And let's see what this looks like through the lens of our camera. 现在，我们可以按下 Alt 键，然后拖动，将其设置回另一个火炬上。 And now we can hit alt click and drag and set this back on our other torch. 现在，在制作子 UV 翻页图书时，有一点非常重要。 Now, one thing when creating sub UV flip books, that's really important. 如你所见，这是一个 4K 纹理。因为这是由 8 个网格组成的、 So as you can see, this is a 4K texture. And because this is in a grid of eight, 这意味着每张图片的宽度都是 512 像素，并不算大。 that means every single image is 512 pixels wide, which isn't that big. 很明显，我们的火在场景中占的空间并不大。 Obviously, our fire isn't taking up a lot of space in our scene. 但在场景中使用方形纹理时会发生一件事、 But one thing that happens with square textures in your scene, 无论是我应用在这个平面上的纹理，还是我们应用在场景中其他几何体上的可铺贴纹理、 whether it's something I've applied to this plane or the tileable textures that we're applying to the other geometry in our scene, 是他们有一种叫做 mipmaps 的东西。 is they have something called mipmaps. 因此，mipmaps 就像 LOD，但 LOD 是针对网格的。 So mipmaps are like LODs, but LODs are for meshes. 其原理是，在屏幕空间中，网格越小越好、 And the idea is that the smaller a mesh is in screen space, 将在 3D 场景中替换分辨率较低的 LOD。 the lower resolution LOD will be replaced inside the 3D scene. 这对距离很远的物体很有帮助、 This helps so objects that are really far away, 当城堡在屏幕上非常小，而且在远处时，我们无法加载它的全分辨率网格。 we're not loading in the full resolution mesh of something like a castle when it's really small on the screen and far away in the distance. 所以我们不需要那么多细节。 So we just don't need all that detail. 很明显，由于我们在虚幻 5 中使用了 Nanite，所以我们现在不使用 LOD。 Obviously, we're not using LODs now that we're using Nanite in Unreal 5. 但贴图是纹理的 LOD。 But mipmaps are the LODs for textures. 因此，根据纹理的屏幕空间，它实际上会以较小的分辨率加载。 So depending on the screen space of a texture, it'll actually load in a smaller resolution. 因此，这里的 4K 纹理可能被加载为 2K 纹理或 1K 纹理。 So what is a 4K texture here might be loaded in as a 2K texture or a 1K texture. 然后变成 1K 纹理，也就是 1024 像素，再除以 8。 And it ever becomes a 1K texture, which is 1024 pixels, and we divide that by 8. 突然间，我们的广场变得非常非常小。 Suddenly, our squares are getting really, really small. 因此，如果要像这样加载子 UV，要做的一件事就是禁用 mipmaps。 So if you're ever loading in sub UVs like this, one thing that you want to do is disable the mipmaps. 我们可以通过更改 mipgen 设置来做到这一点。 And we can do that by changing our mipgen settings. 这些就是我们的 mipmap 设置。 So these are our mipmap settings. 如果我们将其设置为 "无贴图"，基本上就会一直加载 4K 纹理。 And if we set this to no mipmaps, it'll basically always load in our 4K texture. 我们希望强制这样做，因为我们的每个小方格只能获得这么多分辨率。 We want to force this because we only get so much resolution out of each one of our little squares. 因此，在制作这些子 UV 翻页图书时，这绝对是值得的。 So it's definitely worth it when creating these sub UV flipbooks. 但现在我们可以做两件事来改善火把的外观。 But now there's two things we can do to improve the look of our torches. 首先，这两个火炬的回放速度和大小完全相同。 The first one is that both of these torches are playing back at the same exact speed and size. 因此，当我们回头看时，这并不是最明显的东西，因为其中一个要小得多。 So it's not the most obvious thing when we're looking back here because one is a lot smaller. 但我们可以做的一件事很简单，就是创建一个材料实例，并将其从 mmtorch 重命名为 mi，去掉末尾的下划线 inst。 But a simple thing we can do is create a material instance and rename this from mmtorch to
